## Checklist

- [ ] `go vet ./...` clean
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] Builds cleanly for `GOOS=linux` and `GOOS=windows`

- [ ] Commit messages follow `type: summary` (feat, fix, docs, refactor, test, chore)
